Entries.Name: Create Restore Point
Entries.Description: Create a system restore point before applying tweaks
Entries.Detail: Creates a Windows System Restore point so you can roll back system changes if something goes wrong. Recommended before running any tweaks.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Creates a Windows System Restore point so you can roll back system changes if something goes wrong. Recommended before running any tweaks.

Entries.Name: Check WinGet
Entries.Description: Check whether WinGet is installed and ready
Entries.Detail: Validates that WinGet is present and functional. If it is missing or broken, the hidden preset hook repairs it before preset-driven package work continues.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: WinGet is required for noninteractive preset execution and preset-driven package installation.

Entries.Name: Hide About this Picture on Desktop
Entries.Description: Remove the Spotlight 'About this picture' icon from the desktop
Entries.Detail: Removes the small info icon that appears on the desktop when Windows Spotlight wallpapers are active.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Removes the small info icon that appears on the desktop when Windows Spotlight wallpapers are active.
